name: Raisin Bran Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix molasses, melted shortening, sugar, bran, raisins, egg, and sour milk until well combined.
2. In another bowl, sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 1 hour.
6. Remove from oven and allow to cool on a wire rack.
